reforms.description: The latest budget provides new funds to boost research and development, which may help spur innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The budget allocated new funds specifically for R&D.
reforms.importance_rationale: The funding represents a significant but not transformative change in R&D support, aiming to enhance innovation without overhauling existing structures.
reforms.source_quote: The latest budget also provides new funds to boost research and development, which may help spur innovation.

reforms.description: The government has implemented a new programme aimed at encouraging greater private-sector R&D effort to boost overall R&D spending, which remains relatively low by international standards.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased private-sector R&D spending is expected to enhance innovation and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has implemented a new programme to encourage R&D.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant effort to stimulate private-sector R&D, which is crucial for enhancing innovation capacity in the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The government has implemented a new programme in the hope of encouraging greater private-sector R&D effort.

reforms.description: The government proposed a Model Code for Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce to enhance consumer interests, addressing areas such as privacy and security in online transactions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By establishing a framework for consumer protection, the initiative aims to foster trust in electronic commerce, potentially increasing participation and economic activity in the digital economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has proposed a Model Code for Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant step towards regulating the emerging field of electronic commerce, which is crucial for the growth of the digital economy.
reforms.source_quote: To promote Internet use, the government has proposed a Model Code for Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce to protect consumer interests.

reforms.description: The government proposed an Electronic Transactions Bill aimed at removing barriers to Internet transactions and establishing ground rules for electronic trade.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating electronic transactions, the Bill is expected to enhance the efficiency of commerce, thereby promoting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has proposed an Electronic Transactions Bill to remove impediments to Internet transactions.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Bill is a significant reform aimed at modernizing the legal framework for electronic commerce, which is essential for the growth of the digital economy.
reforms.source_quote: A proposed Electronic Transactions Bill would remove impediments to Internet transactions, setting out the ground rules for electronic trade.

reforms.description: The New Zealand government has allocated NZ$331 million over the next four years to fund various economic and regional development programmes through Industry New Zealand, which aims to create a partnership approach with industry.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The funding is intended to enhance regional development and promote business growth, which can lead to increased productivity and economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has allocated funds and established Industry New Zealand to oversee the programmes.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift towards a more coordinated industrial policy, aiming to enhance regional economic development and support businesses.
reforms.source_quote: The government has allocated NZ$331 million over the next four years to fund programmes in this area.

reforms.description: The government has introduced R&D grants, allocating roughly NZ$12 million per annum to fund up to a third of R&D costs for projects, particularly benefiting firms in their start-up phase.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support for R&D, the programme encourages innovation and technological advancement in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: R&D grants have been set aside for funding projects since September 1.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of R&D grants represents a significant step in supporting innovation, particularly for start-ups, but is not a complete overhaul of the funding landscape.
reforms.source_quote: Roughly NZ$12 million per annum has been set aside for this new programme (begun 1 September) that will fund up to a third of R&D costs of a particular project.

reforms.description: The government has announced additional funding for the Technology New Zealand programme, increasing its budget to NZ$24.7 million to provide matching funding for firms to adopt and develop new technology.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This funding aims to facilitate the adoption of new technologies by firms, which can enhance productivity and innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has announced additional funding for this programme.
reforms.importance_rationale: The increase in funding for Technology New Zealand is a significant enhancement of an existing programme aimed at promoting technology adoption, but does not represent a fundamental change in policy.
reforms.source_quote: The government has also announced additional funding of NZ$8.5 million (to NZ$24.7 million) for this programme that provides matching funding to firms to take up, use and develop new technology.

reforms.description: The government announced a Value for Money Initiative to better assess government spending, requiring departments to evaluate and benchmark their expenditures, aiming to improve the productive capacity of the economy.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By mandating evaluations, the initiative aims to ensure that government spending is directed towards effective programs that enhance productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: Ministers are expected to identify spending for further examination under the initiative.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant shift towards evaluating government expenditures, which could lead to more effective allocation of resources.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities recently announced a Value for Money Initiative.

reforms.description: The government introduced a National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Strategy Act to promote energy efficiency and conservation, setting guidelines and targets for renewable energy use.
reforms.package_name: National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Strategy
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By promoting energy efficiency and renewable energy, the strategy aims to enhance productivity and reduce costs for businesses.
reforms.status_evidence: A National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Strategy Act also came into effect in May 2000.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Act represents a comprehensive approach to energy efficiency and conservation, with significant implications for the economy's sustainability and productivity.
reforms.source_quote: A National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Strategy Act also came into effect in May 2000.

reforms.description: The 1999 Budget announced an increase in research and development expenditure, aiming to boost innovation and support economic growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D funding is expected to enhance innovation capacity, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Budget delivered increased funding for R&D.
reforms.importance_rationale: The increase in R&D funding represents a significant commitment to enhancing the innovation landscape in New Zealand, with potential long-term benefits.
reforms.source_quote: Research and development expenditure is boosted.
